Proyecto conciente 
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Proyecto Siachoque</title>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@700;900&family=Source+Sans+3:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{--v:#2d6a4f;--vc:#40916c;--vs:#74c69d;--t:#dda15e;--td:#bc6c25;}
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
body{font-family:"Source Sans 3",sans-serif;background:#f5f0e8;min-height:100vh;}
#nav{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1b4332,var(--v));position:sticky;top:0;z-index:999;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.25);}
.ni{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 1.5rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.brand{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:1.35rem;font-weight:900;color:#fff;padding:.9rem 0;}
.tabs{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.tab{padding:.95rem 1.1rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);font-weight:500;font-size:.86rem;cursor:pointer;border-bottom:3px solid transparent;border-top:none;border-left:none;border-right:none;background:none;font-family:inherit;transition:all .2s;}
.tab:hover{color:#fff;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);}
.tab.on{color:var(--t);border-bottom-color:var(--t);}
.pg{display:none;}.pg.on{display:block;}
.card{background:#fff;border-radius:12px;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.07);}
.icard{background:#fff;border-radius:16px;padding:1.8rem;box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.07);border-top:4px solid var(--vs);transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;}
.icard:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.12);}
.btn{background:var(--v);color:#fff;font-weight:600;padding:.55rem 1.2rem;border-radius:8px;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;font-size:.88rem;transition:background .2s;}
.btn:hover{background:var(--vc);}
.btng{background:#6c757d;color:#fff;font-weight:600;padding:.55rem 1.2rem;border-radius:8px;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;font-size:.88rem;}
.btnr{background:#dc3545;color:#fff;padding:.22rem .5rem;border-radius:6px;font-size:.75rem;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;}
.tbtn{padding:.42rem .95rem;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;font-size:.83rem;border:none;font-family:inherit;}
.tbtn.on{background:var(--v);color:#fff;}
.tbtn:not(.on){background:#e9ecef;color:#495057;}
.modal{display:none;position:fixed;z-index:2000;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.55);align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow-y:auto;}
.mc{background:#fefefe;margin:auto;padding:2rem;width:92%;max-width:790px;border-radius:16px;max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;}
.cls{color:#aaa;float:right;font-size:28px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;line-height:1;}
.cls:hover{color:#333;}
fieldset{border:1px solid #dee2e6;border-radius:8px;}
legend{color:var(--v);font-weight:600;padding:0 .5rem;}
.ml{display:block;padding:.65rem;border:2px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;flex:1;font-size:.88rem;transition:all .2s;}
.ml:hover{background:#f0faf5;border-color:var(--vs);}
.mr:checked+.ml{background:var(--v);border-color:var(--vc);color:#fff;font-weight:700;}
.sr-only{position:absolute;width:1px;height:1px;padding:0;margin:-1px;overflow:hidden;clip:rect(0,0,0,0);border:0;}
.cc{position:relative;height:250px;width:100%;}
.pli.sel{background:#d8f3dc;border-left:4px solid var(--v);}
.uarea{border:2px dashed #b7e4c7;border-radius:12px;padding:2rem;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;background:#f0faf5;transition:all .2s;margin-bottom:1.2rem;}
.uarea:hover,.uarea.dov{border-color:var(--vc);background:#d8f3dc;}
.ggrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(145px,1fr));gap:1rem;}
.gi{position:relative;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;aspect-ratio:1;background:#eee;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.1);animation:fi .4s ease;}
.gi img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.gi .di{position:absolute;top:6px;right:6px;background:rgba(220,38,38,.85);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:50%;width:26px;height:26px;font-size:.72rem;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s;}
.gi:hover .di{opacity:1;}
@keyframes fi{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(.95)}to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}}
footer{background:#1b4332;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);text-align:center;padding:1.5rem;font-size:.83rem;margin-top:3rem;}
footer strong{color:var(--t);}
@media(max-width:768px){#gl,#cg,#ml-grid,#hl-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;}}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav id="nav">
  <div class="ni">
    <div class="brand">🌿 Proyecto Siachoque</div>
    <div class="tabs">
      <button class="tab on" data-pg="p0">🏠 Inicio</button>
      <button class="tab" data-pg="p1">🩺 Seguimiento Geriátrico</button>
      <button class="tab" data-pg="p2">💜 VG Mujeres</button>
      <button class="tab" data-pg="p3">💙 VG Hombres</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- INICIO -->
<div id="p0" class="pg on">
  <div style="background:url('data:image/png;base64,') center/cover no-repeat;min-height:460px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;position:relative;padding:4rem 2rem;">
    <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(160deg,rgba(27,67,50,.72),rgba(45,106,79,.65));"></div>
    <div style="position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:720px;">
      <div style="display:inline-block;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);color:#d8f3dc;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.35rem 1rem;border-radius:100px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);margin-bottom:1.2rem;">🌿 Boyacá, Colombia</div>
      <h1 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,5vw,3.6rem);font-weight:900;color:#fff;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:1rem;">Proyecto <span style="color:var(--t);">Siachoque</span></h1>
      <p style="font-size:1rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);line-height:1.7;font-weight:300;max-width:540px;margin:0 auto;">Programa comunitario de atención integral al adulto mayor y prevención de violencia de género, comprometido con el bienestar de nuestra comunidad.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:3rem 2rem;">
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:2.5rem;">
      <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.9rem;color:var(--v);">¿Qué es el Proyecto Siachoque?</h2>
    </div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(250px,1fr));gap:1.4rem;margin-bottom:3rem;">
      <div class="icard"><div style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:.8rem;">🎯</div><h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--v);margin-bottom:.5rem;">Misión</h3><p style="font-size:.88rem;color:#555;line-height:1.6;">Brindar atención médica integral al adulto mayor y víctimas de VG del municipio, fortaleciendo su calidad de vida.</p></div>
      <div class="icard"><div style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:.8rem;">🌄</div><h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--v);margin-bottom:.5rem;">Visión</h3><p style="font-size:.88rem;color:#555;line-height:1.6;">Ser modelo de atención primaria en salud rural de Boyacá, con cuidado personalizado y digno.</p></div>
      <div class="icard"><div style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:.8rem;">🤝</div><h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--v);margin-bottom:.5rem;">Compromiso</h3><p style="font-size:.88rem;color:#555;line-height:1.6;">Trabajamos con familias y personal de salud para garantizar atención integral en toda la comunidad.</p></div>
      <div class="icard" style="border-top-color:var(--t)"><div style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:.8rem;">📊</div><h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--v);margin-bottom:.5rem;">Herramientas</h3><p style="font-size:.88rem;color:#555;line-height:1.6;">SPPB, Pfeiffer, Morisky-Green, Up and Go, Framingham, WAST, ISA, Danger Assessment, AUDIT, SARA y EAS.</p></div>
      <div class="icard" style="border-top-color:var(--t)"><div style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:.8rem;">👩‍⚕️</div><h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--v);margin-bottom:.5rem;">Equipo</h3><p style="font-size:.88rem;color:#555;line-height:1.6;">Médicos, enfermeras y promotores en geriatría y atención a víctimas de VG.</p></div>
      <div class="icard" style="border-top-color:var(--t)"><div style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:.8rem;">📍</div><h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--v);margin-bottom:.5rem;">Ubicación</h3><p style="font-size:.88rem;color:#555;line-height:1.6;">Municipio de Siachoque, Boyacá, Colombia. Veredas y casco urbano.</p></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card" style="padding:2rem;">
      <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:var(--v);font-size:1.35rem;margin-bottom:.3rem;">📸 Galería</h2>
      <p style="color:#777;font-size:.87rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem;">Imágenes del programa y actividades comunitarias.</p>
      <div class="uarea" id="ua">
        <div style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:.4rem;">🖼️</div>
        <p style="color:var(--v);font-weight:500;">Arrastra imágenes aquí</p>
        <small style="color:#888;font-size:.78rem;">PNG, JPG, WEBP</small><br>
        <button class="btn" style="margin-top:.8rem;" onclick="document.getElementById('fi').click()">Seleccionar</button>
      </div>
      <input type="file" id="fi" multiple accept="image/*" style="display:none;">
      <div id="ge" style="text-align:center;color:#aaa;font-size:.87rem;padding:1rem 0;">🌿 Agrega fotos del proyecto.</div>
      <div id="gg" class="ggrid"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- GERIATRÍA -->
<div id="p1" class="pg">
<div style="max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:2rem;">
  <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1b4332,var(--vc));border-radius:16px;padding:1.8rem 2rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem;color:#fff;">
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1rem;">
      <div><h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:700;">🩺 Seguimiento Geriátrico</h2><p style="opacity:.8;font-size:.9rem;margin-top:.3rem;">Valoración integral del adulto mayor — Siachoque</p></div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:.6rem;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;">
        <button onclick="gExp()" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);color:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4);padding:.42rem .9rem;border-radius:8px;font-size:.82rem;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">⬇ Exportar</button>
        <label style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);color:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4);padding:.42rem .9rem;border-radius:8px;font-size:.82rem;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">⬆ Importar<input type="file" id="gimp" accept=".json" style="display:none;" onchange="gImp(event)"></label>
        <span id="ginf" style="font-size:.77rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);"></span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 2fr;gap:1.5rem;" id="gl">
    <div class="card" style="padding:1.5rem;">
      <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--v);margin-bottom:1rem;">Pacientes</h3>
      <button class="btn" id="gab" style="width:100%;margin-bottom:1rem;">+ Agregar Paciente</button>
      <ul id="gpl" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.4rem;"><li style="text-align:center;color:#bbb;padding:1.5rem 0;font-size:.87rem;">Sin pacientes.</li></ul>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem;">
        <button class="tbtn on" id="gt1">Detalles</button>
        <button class="tbtn" id="gt2">Datos Agregados</button>
        <button class="tbtn" id="gt3">Formatos</button>
      </div>
      <div id="gv1">
        <div id="gwel" class="card" style="padding:3rem;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:3rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">🌿</div><h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--v);">Selecciona un paciente</h2><p style="color:#888;margin-top:.5rem;font-size:.9rem;">o agrega uno nuevo para comenzar.</p></div>
        <div id="gdet" style="display:none;" class="card" style="">
          <div style="padding:1.5rem;">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.8rem;">
            <div><h2 id="gpn" style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--v);"></h2><p id="gpi" style="color:#888;font-size:.87rem;"></p></div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;">
              <button class="btng" id="gedb">Editar</button>
              <button class="btng" id="ghsb">Ver Historia</button>
              <button class="btn" id="grb">+ Medición</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <hr style="margin:1.2rem 0;border-color:#eee;">
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1rem;" id="cg">
            <div class="card" style="padding:.9rem;"><h3 style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;text-align:center;color:#555;margin-bottom:.4rem;">SPPB — Fragilidad</h3><div class="cc"><canvas id="cFr"></canvas></div></div>
            <div class="card" style="padding:.9rem;"><h3 style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;text-align:center;color:#555;margin-bottom:.4rem;">Up & Go — Caída</h3><div class="cc"><canvas id="cFl"></canvas></div></div>
            <div class="card" style="padding:.9rem;"><h3 style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;text-align:center;color:#555;margin-bottom:.4rem;">Pfeiffer — Cognitiva</h3><div class="cc"><canvas id="cCo"></canvas></div></div>
            <div class="card" style="padding:.9rem;"><h3 style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;text-align:center;color:#555;margin-bottom:.4rem;">Morisky — Adherencia</h3><div class="cc"><canvas id="cAd"></canvas></div></div>
            <div class="card" style="padding:.9rem;grid-column:1/-1;"><h3 style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;text-align:center;color:#555;margin-bottom:.4rem;">Framingham — Riesgo Cardiovascular %</h3><div class="cc"><canvas id="cCa"></canvas></div></div>
          </div>
          <div id="grec" style="margin-top:1.5rem;"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div id="gv2" style="display:none;" class="card">
        <div style="padding:1.5rem;">
          <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--v);margin-bottom:1rem;">Promedios — Todos los Pacientes</h2>
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1rem;">
            <div class="card" style="padding:.9rem;"><h3 style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;text-align:center;color:#555;margin-bottom:.4rem;">SPPB</h3><div class="cc"><canvas id="acFr"></canvas></div></div>
            <div class="card" style="padding:.9rem;"><h3 style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;text-align:center;color:#555;margin-bottom:.4rem;">Up & Go</h3><div class="cc"><canvas id="acFl"></canvas></div></div>
            <div class="card" style="padding:.9rem;"><h3 style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;text-align:center;color:#555;margin-bottom:.4rem;">Pfeiffer</h3><div class="cc"><canvas id="acCo"></canvas></div></div>
            <div class="card" style="padding:.9rem;"><h3 style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;text-align:center;color:#555;margin-bottom:.4rem;">Morisky</h3><div class="cc"><canvas id="acAd"></canvas></div></div>
            <div class="card" style="padding:.9rem;grid-column:1/-1;"><h3 style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;text-align:center;color:#555;margin-bottom:.4rem;">Framingham</h3><div class="cc"><canvas id="acCa"></canvas></div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div id="gv3" style="display:none;" class="card">
        <div style="padding:1.5rem;">
          <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:var(--v);font-size:1.1rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">Formatos de Escalas</h2>
          <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;">
            <div style="background:#f0faf5;border-radius:10px;padding:1.1rem;border-left:4px solid var(--vs);"><b style="color:var(--v);">Morisky-Green:</b> <span style="font-size:.87rem;color:#555;">Cumplidor No/Sí/No/No · Incumplidor cualquier otra respuesta.</span></div>
            <div style="background:#fff8f0;border-radius:10px;padding:1.1rem;border-left:4px solid var(--t);"><b style="color:var(--td);">SPPB:</b> <span style="font-size:.87rem;color:#555;">0–3 Frágil · 4–9 Pre-frágil · 10–12 No frágil</span></div>
            <div style="background:#f0f4ff;border-radius:10px;padding:1.1rem;border-left:4px solid #6366f1;"><b style="color:#3346aa;">Up & Go:</b> <span style="font-size:.87rem;color:#555;">&lt;12 seg Normal · &gt;12 seg Riesgo Alto</span></div>
            <div style="background:#fef0f0;border-radius:10px;padding:1.1rem;border-left:4px solid #f43f5e;"><b style="color:#c00;">Pfeiffer:</b> <span style="font-size:.87rem;color:#555;">0–2 Normal · 3–4 Leve · 5–7 Moderado · 8–10 Severo</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- VG MUJERES -->
<div id="p2" class="pg">
<div style="max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:2rem;">
  <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6b21a8,#a855f7);border-radius:16px;padding:1.8rem 2rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem;color:#fff;">
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1rem;">
      <div><h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:700;">💜 VG Mujeres</h2><p style="opacity:.8;font-size:.9rem;margin-top:.3rem;">Valoración y seguimiento de casos — Siachoque</p></div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:.6rem;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;">
        <button onclick="mExp()" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);color:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4);padding:.42rem .9rem;border-radius:8px;font-size:.82rem;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">⬇ Exportar</button>
        <label style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);color:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4);padding:.42rem .9rem;border-radius:8px;font-size:.82rem;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">⬆ Importar<input type="file" id="mimp" accept=".json" style="display:none;" onchange="mImp(event)"></label>
        <span id="minf" style="font-size:.77rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);"></span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 2.2fr;gap:1.5rem;" id="ml-grid">
    <div class="card" style="padding:1.5rem;border-top:4px solid #a855f7;">
      <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:#6b21a8;font-size:1.1rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">Casos</h3>
      <button class="btn" id="mab" style="width:100%;margin-bottom:1rem;background:#7c3aed;">+ Nuevo Caso</button>
      <ul id="mpl" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.4rem;"><li style="text-align:center;color:#bbb;padding:1.5rem 0;font-size:.87rem;">Sin casos.</li></ul>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem;">
        <button class="tbtn on" id="mt1">Detalle</button>
        <button class="tbtn" id="mt2">Formatos</button>
      </div>
      <div id="mv1">
        <div id="mwel" class="card" style="padding:3rem;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:3rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">💜</div><h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:#7c3aed;">Módulo VG Mujeres</h2><p style="color:#888;margin-top:.5rem;font-size:.9rem;">Selecciona un caso o registra uno nuevo.</p></div>
        <div id="mdet" style="display:none;" class="card">
          <div style="padding:1.5rem;">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.8rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">
            <div><h2 id="mcn" style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.5rem;color:#6b21a8;"></h2><p id="mci" style="color:#888;font-size:.87rem;"></p></div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;">
              <button class="btng" id="medb">Editar</button>
              <button class="btng" id="mhsb">Ver Historia</button>
              <button class="btn" id="mrb" style="background:#7c3aed;">+ Valoración</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <hr style="margin-bottom:1.2rem;border-color:#f0e6ff;">
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1rem;">
            <div class="card" style="padding:.9rem;"><h3 style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;text-align:center;color:#7c3aed;margin-bottom:.4rem;">WAST</h3><div class="cc"><canvas id="cWA"></canvas></div></div>
            <div class="card" style="padding:.9rem;"><h3 style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;text-align:center;color:#7c3aed;margin-bottom:.4rem;">ISA</h3><div class="cc"><canvas id="cIS"></canvas></div></div>
            <div class="card" style="padding:.9rem;grid-column:1/-1;"><h3 style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;text-align:center;color:#be123c;margin-bottom:.4rem;">Danger Assessment</h3><div class="cc"><canvas id="cDA"></canvas></div></div>
          </div>
          <div id="mrec" style="margin-top:1.5rem;"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div id="mv2" style="display:none;" class="card">
        <div style="padding:1.5rem;">
          <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:#6b21a8;font-size:1.1rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">Formatos — Mujeres</h2>
          <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;">
            <div style="background:#faf5ff;border-radius:10px;padding:1.1rem;border-left:4px solid #a855f7;"><b style="color:#6b21a8;">WAST (0–16):</b><p style="font-size:.87rem;color:#555;margin-top:.3rem;">0–7 Bajo · 8–12 Moderado · 13–16 Alto. Positivo si P1 "Mala/Muy mala" O P2 "A veces/Siempre".</p></div>
            <div style="background:#fdf4ff;border-radius:10px;padding:1.1rem;border-left:4px solid #c084fc;"><b style="color:#7e22ce;">ISA (0–100):</b><p style="font-size:.87rem;color:#555;margin-top:.3rem;">ISA-P ≥10: Abuso físico significativo · ISA-NP ≥25: Abuso no físico.</p></div>
            <div style="background:#fff1f2;border-radius:10px;padding:1.1rem;border-left:4px solid #f43f5e;"><b style="color:#be123c;">Danger Assessment (0–20):</b><p style="font-size:.87rem;color:#555;margin-top:.3rem;">0–7 Variable · 8–13 Aumentado · 14–17 Severo · 18+ Extremo.</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- VG HOMBRES -->
<div id="p3" class="pg">
<div style="max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:2rem;">
  <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1e3a8a,#3b82f6);border-radius:16px;padding:1.8rem 2rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem;color:#fff;">
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1rem;">
      <div><h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:700;">💙 VG Hombres</h2><p style="opacity:.8;font-size:.9rem;margin-top:.3rem;">Valoración y seguimiento de casos — Siachoque</p></div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:.6rem;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;">
        <button onclick="hExp()" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);color:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4);padding:.42rem .9rem;border-radius:8px;font-size:.82rem;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">⬇ Exportar</button>
        <label style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);color:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4);padding:.42rem .9rem;border-radius:8px;font-size:.82rem;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">⬆ Importar<input type="file" id="himp" accept=".json" style="display:none;" onchange="hImp(event)"></label>
        <span id="hinf" style="font-size:.77rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);"></span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 2.2fr;gap:1.5rem;" id="hl-grid">
    <div class="card" style="padding:1.5rem;border-top:4px solid #3b82f6;">
      <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:#1e3a8a;font-size:1.1rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">Casos</h3>
      <button class="btn" id="hab" style="width:100%;margin-bottom:1rem;background:#1d4ed8;">+ Nuevo Caso</button>
      <ul id="hpl" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.4rem;"><li style="text-align:center;color:#bbb;padding:1.5rem 0;font-size:.87rem;">Sin casos.</li></ul>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem;">
        <button class="tbtn on" id="ht1">Detalle</button>
        <button class="tbtn" id="ht2">Formatos</button>
      </div>
      <div id="hv1">
        <div id="hwel" class="card" style="padding:3rem;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:3rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">💙</div><h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:#1d4ed8;">Módulo VG Hombres</h2><p style="color:#888;margin-top:.5rem;font-size:.9rem;">Selecciona un caso o registra uno nuevo.</p></div>
        <div id="hdet" style="display:none;" class="card">
          <div style="padding:1.5rem;">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.8rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">
            <div><h2 id="hcn" style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.5rem;color:#1e3a8a;"></h2><p id="hci" style="color:#888;font-size:.87rem;"></p></div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;">
              <button class="btng" id="hedb">Editar</button>
              <button class="btng" id="hhsb">Ver Historia</button>
              <button class="btn" id="hrb" style="background:#1d4ed8;">+ Valoración</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <hr style="margin-bottom:1.2rem;border-color:#e0eaff;">
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1rem;">
            <div class="card" style="padding:.9rem;"><h3 style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;text-align:center;color:#1d4ed8;margin-bottom:.4rem;">AUDIT</h3><div class="cc"><canvas id="cAU"></canvas></div></div>
            <div class="card" style="padding:.9rem;"><h3 style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;text-align:center;color:#3730a3;margin-bottom:.4rem;">SARA</h3><div class="cc"><canvas id="cSA"></canvas></div></div>
            <div class="card" style="padding:.9rem;grid-column:1/-1;"><h3 style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;text-align:center;color:#713f12;margin-bottom:.4rem;">EAS — Actitudes hacia la Violencia</h3><div class="cc"><canvas id="cEA"></canvas></div></div>
          </div>
          <div id="hrec" style="margin-top:1.5rem;"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div id="hv2" style="display:none;" class="card">
        <div style="padding:1.5rem;">
          <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:#1e3a8a;font-size:1.1rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">Formatos — Hombres</h2>
          <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;">
            <div style="background:#eff6ff;border-radius:10px;padding:1.1rem;border-left:4px solid #3b82f6;"><b style="color:#1e3a8a;">AUDIT (0–40):</b><p style="font-size:.87rem;color:#555;margin-top:.3rem;">0–7 Bajo riesgo · 8–15 Riesgo · 16–19 Perjudicial · 20+ Dependencia.</p></div>
            <div style="background:#f0f4ff;border-radius:10px;padding:1.1rem;border-left:4px solid #6366f1;"><b style="color:#3730a3;">SARA (0–60):</b><p style="font-size:.87rem;color:#555;margin-top:.3rem;">0–11 Bajo · 12–24 Moderado · 25+ Alto (intervención urgente).</p></div>
            <div style="background:#fefce8;border-radius:10px;padding:1.1rem;border-left:4px solid #eab308;"><b style="color:#713f12;">EAS (0–100):</b><p style="font-size:.87rem;color:#555;margin-top:.3rem;">Mayor puntaje = mayor tolerancia a la VG. Punto de corte: ≥50.</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<footer><strong>Proyecto Siachoque</strong> — Programa comunitario · Boyacá, Colombia · 2025</footer>

<!-- MODALES GERIATRÍA -->
<div id="gpm" class="modal"><div class="mc">
  <span class="cls" onclick="document.getElementById('gpm').style.display='none'">&times;</span>
  <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:var(--v);font-size:1.3rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem;">Historia Clínica — Paciente</h2>
  <form id="gpf" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;">
    <input type="hidden" id="gpeid">
    <fieldset style="padding:1rem;"><legend>Identificación</legend>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:.8rem;margin-top:.8rem;">
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Nombre</label><input type="text" id="gpname" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Documento</label><input type="text" id="gpdoc" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">F. Nacimiento</label><input type="date" id="gpbd" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Sexo</label><select id="gpsex" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"><option>Femenino</option><option>Masculino</option></select></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Dirección</label><input type="text" id="gpaddr" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Teléfono</label><input type="tel" id="gptel" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Estado Civil</label><input type="text" id="gpciv" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Ocupación</label><input type="text" id="gpocc" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">EAPBS</label><input type="text" id="gpeapbs" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Régimen</label><input type="text" id="gpreg" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
    </div></fieldset>
    <fieldset style="padding:1rem;"><legend>Consulta Actual</legend>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.8rem;margin-top:.8rem;">
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Motivo</label><textarea id="gpreason" rows="2" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></textarea></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Enfermedad Actual</label><textarea id="gpill" rows="2" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></textarea></div>
    </div></fieldset>
    <fieldset style="padding:1rem;"><legend>Antecedentes</legend>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:.8rem;margin-top:.8rem;">
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Patológicos</label><textarea id="gpapat" rows="2" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></textarea></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Quirúrgicos</label><textarea id="gpaqui" rows="2" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></textarea></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Farmacológicos</label><textarea id="gpafar" rows="2" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></textarea></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Tóxicos</label><textarea id="gpatox" rows="2" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></textarea></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Familiares</label><textarea id="gpafam" rows="2" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></textarea></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Alérgicos</label><textarea id="gpaale" rows="2" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></textarea></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Hemoclasificación</label><input type="text" id="gpahem" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Vivienda</label><input type="text" id="gphous" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
    </div></fieldset>
    <fieldset id="gpgin" style="padding:1rem;"><legend>Ginecológicos</legend>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:.8rem;margin-top:.8rem;">
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">FUR</label><input type="date" id="gpfur" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">G</label><input type="number" id="gpgg" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">P</label><input type="number" id="gpgp" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">V</label><input type="number" id="gpgv" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">A</label><input type="number" id="gpga" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">C</label><input type="number" id="gpgc" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
      <div style="grid-column:span 2;"><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Planificación</label><input type="text" id="gpplan" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
    </div></fieldset>
    <button type="submit" class="btn" style="width:100%;padding:.75rem;font-size:1rem;">Guardar Paciente</button>
  </form>
</div></div>

<div id="grm" class="modal"><div class="mc">
  <span class="cls" onclick="document.getElementById('grm').style.display='none'">&times;</span>
  <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:var(--v);font-size:1.2rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">Nueva Medición — <span id="grpn" style="color:var(--td);"></span></h2>
  <form id="grf" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;">
    <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Fecha</label><input type="date" id="grdate" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #eee;padding:.8rem;border-radius:8px;"><label style="font-weight:700;color:var(--v);font-size:.87rem;">SPPB — Fragilidad (0–12)</label><input type="number" step="any" id="grfrag" min="0" max="12" style="margin-top:.4rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required><p style="font-size:.75rem;color:#888;margin-top:.3rem;">0–3 Frágil · 4–9 Pre-frágil · 10–12 No frágil</p></div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #eee;padding:.8rem;border-radius:8px;"><label style="font-weight:700;color:var(--v);font-size:.87rem;">Up and Go (segundos)</label><input type="number" step="any" id="grfall" min="0" style="margin-top:.4rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #eee;padding:.8rem;border-radius:8px;"><label style="font-weight:700;color:var(--v);font-size:.87rem;">Pfeiffer — Errores (0–10)</label><input type="number" step="any" id="grcog" min="0" max="10" style="margin-top:.4rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
    <fieldset style="padding:.8rem;"><legend style="font-size:.87rem;">Morisky-Green</legend>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.7rem;margin-top:.6rem;">
      <div><p style="font-size:.84rem;">1. ¿Olvida alguna vez tomar los medicamentos?</p><div style="display:flex;gap:.5rem;margin-top:.3rem;"><input type="radio" name="mq1" value="si" id="mq1s" class="sr-only mr"><label for="mq1s" class="ml">Sí</label><input type="radio" name="mq1" value="no" id="mq1n" class="sr-only mr"><label for="mq1n" class="ml">No</label></div></div>
      <div><p style="font-size:.84rem;">2. ¿Toma los medicamentos a las horas indicadas?</p><div style="display:flex;gap:.5rem;margin-top:.3rem;"><input type="radio" name="mq2" value="si" id="mq2s" class="sr-only mr"><label for="mq2s" class="ml">Sí</label><input type="radio" name="mq2" value="no" id="mq2n" class="sr-only mr"><label for="mq2n" class="ml">No</label></div></div>
      <div><p style="font-size:.84rem;">3. Cuando se encuentra bien, ¿deja de tomar la medicación?</p><div style="display:flex;gap:.5rem;margin-top:.3rem;"><input type="radio" name="mq3" value="si" id="mq3s" class="sr-only mr"><label for="mq3s" class="ml">Sí</label><input type="radio" name="mq3" value="no" id="mq3n" class="sr-only mr"><label for="mq3n" class="ml">No</label></div></div>
      <div><p style="font-size:.84rem;">4. Si alguna vez le sienta mal, ¿deja de tomarla?</p><div style="display:flex;gap:.5rem;margin-top:.3rem;"><input type="radio" name="mq4" value="si" id="mq4s" class="sr-only mr"><label for="mq4s" class="ml">Sí</label><input type="radio" name="mq4" value="no" id="mq4n" class="sr-only mr"><label for="mq4n" class="ml">No</label></div></div>
    </div>
    <div id="morres" style="margin-top:.8rem;padding:.6rem;background:#f5f5f5;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;font-size:.84rem;color:#555;">Seleccione una respuesta para cada pregunta.</div>
    <input type="hidden" id="gradh">
    </fieldset>
    <div style="border:1px solid #eee;padding:.8rem;border-radius:8px;"><label style="font-weight:700;color:var(--v);font-size:.87rem;">Framingham — Riesgo Cardiovascular (%)</label><input type="number" step="any" id="grcard" min="0" max="100" style="margin-top:.4rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
    <button type="submit" class="btn" style="width:100%;padding:.75rem;font-size:1rem;">Guardar Medición</button>
  </form>
</div></div>

<div id="ghm" class="modal"><div class="mc">
  <span class="cls" onclick="document.getElementById('ghm').style.display='none'">&times;</span>
  <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:var(--v);font-size:1.3rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">Historia — <span id="ghname" style="color:var(--td);"></span></h2>
  <div id="ghc"></div>
</div></div>

<div id="gcm" class="modal"><div class="mc" style="text-align:center;max-width:400px;">
  <h2 style="font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:1rem;">Confirmar Eliminación</h2>
  <p id="gctxt" style="color:#555;margin-bottom:1.5rem;font-size:.9rem;"></p>
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:.8rem;">
    <button id="gcno" class="btng">Cancelar</button>
    <button id="gcok" class="btnr" style="padding:.5rem 1.2rem;font-size:.9rem;">Confirmar</button>
  </div>
</div></div>

<!-- MODALES VG MUJERES -->
<div id="mpm" class="modal"><div class="mc">
  <span class="cls" onclick="document.getElementById('mpm').style.display='none'">&times;</span>
  <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:#6b21a8;font-size:1.3rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem;">Registro — Mujer</h2>
  <form id="mpf" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;">
    <input type="hidden" id="mpeid">
    <fieldset style="padding:1rem;border-color:#e9d5ff;"><legend style="color:#7c3aed;">Identificación</legend>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:.8rem;margin-top:.8rem;">
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Nombre</label><input type="text" id="mpname" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Documento</label><input type="text" id="mpdoc" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">F. Nacimiento</label><input type="date" id="mpbd" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Teléfono</label><input type="tel" id="mptel" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Dirección</label><input type="text" id="mpaddr" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Estado Civil</label><select id="mpciv" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"><option>Soltera</option><option>Casada</option><option>Unión libre</option><option>Separada</option><option>Viuda</option></select></div>
    </div></fieldset>
    <fieldset style="padding:1rem;border-color:#e9d5ff;"><legend style="color:#7c3aed;">Contexto de Violencia</legend>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.8rem;margin-top:.8rem;">
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Tipos de violencia</label>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;margin-top:.4rem;">
        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.3rem;font-size:.84rem;"><input type="checkbox" class="mvt" value="Física"> Física</label>
        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.3rem;font-size:.84rem;"><input type="checkbox" class="mvt" value="Psicológica"> Psicológica</label>
        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.3rem;font-size:.84rem;"><input type="checkbox" class="mvt" value="Sexual"> Sexual</label>
        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.3rem;font-size:.84rem;"><input type="checkbox" class="mvt" value="Económica"> Económica</label>
        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.3rem;font-size:.84rem;"><input type="checkbox" class="mvt" value="Patrimonial"> Patrimonial</label>
      </div></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Tiempo de exposición</label><input type="text" id="mpdur" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Motivo de consulta</label><textarea id="mpreason" rows="2" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></textarea></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Denuncias previas</label><select id="mprep" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"><option>No</option><option>Sí</option><option>En proceso</option></select></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Ruta de atención activada</label><textarea id="mproute" rows="2" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></textarea></div>
    </div></fieldset>
    <button type="submit" class="btn" style="width:100%;padding:.75rem;background:#7c3aed;font-size:1rem;">Guardar</button>
  </form>
</div></div>

<div id="mrm" class="modal"><div class="mc">
  <span class="cls" onclick="document.getElementById('mrm').style.display='none'">&times;</span>
  <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:#6b21a8;font-size:1.2rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">Valoración — <span id="mrcn" style="color:#a855f7;"></span></h2>
  <form id="mrf" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;">
    <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Fecha</label><input type="date" id="mrdate" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #e9d5ff;padding:.8rem;border-radius:8px;"><label style="font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;font-size:.87rem;">WAST (0–16)</label><input type="number" id="mrwast" min="0" max="16" style="margin-top:.4rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #e9d5ff;padding:.8rem;border-radius:8px;"><label style="font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;font-size:.87rem;">ISA (0–100)</label><input type="number" id="mrisa" min="0" max="100" style="margin-top:.4rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #fecdd3;padding:.8rem;border-radius:8px;"><label style="font-weight:700;color:#be123c;font-size:.87rem;">Danger Assessment (0–20)</label><input type="number" id="mrdanger" min="0" max="20" style="margin-top:.4rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
    <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Observaciones</label><textarea id="mrnotes" rows="2" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></textarea></div>
    <button type="submit" class="btn" style="width:100%;padding:.75rem;background:#7c3aed;font-size:1rem;">Guardar</button>
  </form>
</div></div>

<div id="mhm" class="modal"><div class="mc">
  <span class="cls" onclick="document.getElementById('mhm').style.display='none'">&times;</span>
  <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:#6b21a8;font-size:1.3rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">Historia — <span id="mhname" style="color:#a855f7;"></span></h2>
  <div id="mhc"></div>
</div></div>

<!-- MODALES VG HOMBRES -->
<div id="hpm" class="modal"><div class="mc">
  <span class="cls" onclick="document.getElementById('hpm').style.display='none'">&times;</span>
  <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:#1e3a8a;font-size:1.3rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem;">Registro — Hombre</h2>
  <form id="hpf" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;">
    <input type="hidden" id="hpeid">
    <fieldset style="padding:1rem;border-color:#bfdbfe;"><legend style="color:#1d4ed8;">Identificación</legend>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:.8rem;margin-top:.8rem;">
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Nombre</label><input type="text" id="hpname" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Documento</label><input type="text" id="hpdoc" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">F. Nacimiento</label><input type="date" id="hpbd" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Teléfono</label><input type="tel" id="hptel" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Dirección</label><input type="text" id="hpaddr" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Rol en el caso</label><select id="hprole" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"><option>Agresor en proceso</option><option>Víctima de VG</option><option>En intervención terapéutica</option></select></div>
    </div></fieldset>
    <fieldset style="padding:1rem;border-color:#bfdbfe;"><legend style="color:#1d4ed8;">Contexto del Caso</legend>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.8rem;margin-top:.8rem;">
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Tipos de violencia</label>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;margin-top:.4rem;">
        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.3rem;font-size:.84rem;"><input type="checkbox" class="hvt" value="Física"> Física</label>
        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.3rem;font-size:.84rem;"><input type="checkbox" class="hvt" value="Psicológica"> Psicológica</label>
        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.3rem;font-size:.84rem;"><input type="checkbox" class="hvt" value="Sexual"> Sexual</label>
        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.3rem;font-size:.84rem;"><input type="checkbox" class="hvt" value="Económica"> Económica</label>
        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.3rem;font-size:.84rem;"><input type="checkbox" class="hvt" value="Intimidación"> Intimidación</label>
      </div></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Tiempo de la problemática</label><input type="text" id="hpdur" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Motivo de consulta</label><textarea id="hpreason" rows="2" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></textarea></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Medidas legales vigentes</label><select id="hplegal" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"><option>No</option><option>Medida de protección</option><option>Proceso penal</option><option>En trámite</option></select></div>
      <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Intervención activada</label><textarea id="hpinter" rows="2" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></textarea></div>
    </div></fieldset>
    <button type="submit" class="btn" style="width:100%;padding:.75rem;background:#1d4ed8;font-size:1rem;">Guardar</button>
  </form>
</div></div>

<div id="hrm" class="modal"><div class="mc">
  <span class="cls" onclick="document.getElementById('hrm').style.display='none'">&times;</span>
  <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:#1e3a8a;font-size:1.2rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">Valoración — <span id="hrcn" style="color:#3b82f6;"></span></h2>
  <form id="hrf" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;">
    <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Fecha</label><input type="date" id="hrdate" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #bfdbfe;padding:.8rem;border-radius:8px;"><label style="font-weight:700;color:#1d4ed8;font-size:.87rem;">AUDIT (0–40)</label><input type="number" id="hraudit" min="0" max="40" style="margin-top:.4rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #c7d2fe;padding:.8rem;border-radius:8px;"><label style="font-weight:700;color:#3730a3;font-size:.87rem;">SARA (0–60)</label><input type="number" id="hrsara" min="0" max="60" style="margin-top:.4rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #fef08a;padding:.8rem;border-radius:8px;"><label style="font-weight:700;color:#713f12;font-size:.87rem;">EAS (0–100)</label><input type="number" id="hreas" min="0" max="100" style="margin-top:.4rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;" required></div>
    <div><label style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;color:#444;">Observaciones</label><textarea id="hrnotes" rows="2" style="margin-top:.3rem;width:100%;padding:.5rem;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;"></textarea></div>
    <button type="submit" class="btn" style="width:100%;padding:.75rem;background:#1d4ed8;font-size:1rem;">Guardar</button>
  </form>
</div></div>

<div id="hhm" class="modal"><div class="mc">
  <span class="cls" onclick="document.getElementById('hhm').style.display='none'">&times;</span>
  <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:#1e3a8a;font-size:1.3rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">Historia — <span id="hhname" style="color:#3b82f6;"></span></h2>
  <div id="hhc"></div>
</div></div>

<div id="vcm" class="modal"><div class="mc" style="text-align:center;max-width:400px;">
  <h2 style="font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:1rem;">Confirmar Eliminación</h2>
  <p id="vctxt" style="color:#555;margin-bottom:1.5rem;font-size:.9rem;"></p>
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:.8rem;">
    <button id="vcno" class="btng">Cancelar</button>
    <button id="vcok" class="btnr" style="padding:.5rem 1.2rem;font-size:.9rem;">Confirmar</button>
  </div>
</div></div>

<script>
(function(){
var $ = function(id){return document.getElementById(id);};
var age = function(bd){var b=new Date(bd),t=new Date(),a=t.getFullYear()-b.getFullYear();if(t.getMonth()-b.getMonth()<0||(t.getMonth()===b.getMonth()&&t.getDate()<b.getDate()))a--;return a;};
// ── IndexedDB storage engine ──
var _db = null;
var _dbReady = new Promise(function(resolve, reject){
  var req = indexedDB.open('siachoque', 1);
  req.onupgradeneeded = function(e){
    var db = e.target.result;
    if(!db.objectStoreNames.contains('kv')) db.createObjectStore('kv');
  };
  req.onsuccess = function(e){ _db = e.target.result; resolve(); };
  req.onerror = function(){ reject(req.error); };
});
var sv = function(k,v){
  _dbReady.then(function(){
    var tx = _db.transaction('kv','readwrite');
    tx.objectStore('kv').put(JSON.stringify(v), k);
    tx.objectStore('kv').put(new Date().toISOString(), k+'_u');
  }).catch(function(){ alert('Error al guardar datos.'); });
};
var svTs = function(k, cb){
  _dbReady.then(function(){
    var tx = _db.transaction('kv','readonly');
    var req = tx.objectStore('kv').get(k+'_u');
    req.onsuccess = function(){ cb(req.result||null); };
  }).catch(function(){ cb(null); });
};
var ldAsync = function(k, d, cb){
  _dbReady.then(function(){
    var tx = _db.transaction('kv','readonly');
    var req = tx.objectStore('kv').get(k);
    req.onsuccess = function(){
      try{ cb(req.result ? (JSON.parse(req.result)||d) : d); }
      catch(e){ cb(d); }
    };
    req.onerror = function(){ cb(d); };
  }).catch(function(){ cb(d); });
};
var fd = function(d){return new Date(d).toLocaleDateString('es-ES');};
var row = function(l,v){return '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 2fr;gap:.4rem;padding:.32rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid #f3f4f6;"><span style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;color:#888;">'+l+'</span><span style="font-size:.83rem;color:#333;">'+(v||'—')+'</span></div>';};
var charts = {};
var mkC = function(id,lbl,lbls,data,color){
  var c=$(id); if(!c)return;
  if(charts[id])charts[id].destroy();
  charts[id]=new Chart(c.getContext('2d'),{type:'line',data:{labels:lbls,datasets:[{label:lbl,data:data,borderColor:color,backgroundColor:color+'22',tension:.3,fill:true,pointRadius:4,pointBackgroundColor:color}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,scales:{y:{beginAtZero:true},x:{grid:{display:false}}},plugins:{legend:{display:false}}}});
};
var expDl = function(data,fname){var b=new Blob([JSON.stringify(data,null,2)],{type:'application/json'});var a=document.createElement('a');a.href=URL.createObjectURL(b);a.download=fname;a.click();};
var mkTbl = function(cols,rows,bc){
  var h='<div style="overflow-x:auto;"><table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:.82rem;"><thead><tr style="background:'+bc+'18;">';
  cols.forEach(function(c){h+='<th style="padding:.42rem;border:1px solid '+bc+'44;color:'+bc+';">'+c+'</th>';});
  h+='</tr></thead><tbody>';
  rows.forEach(function(r){h+='<tr>';r.forEach(function(c){h+='<td style="padding:.38rem;border:1px solid #eee;text-align:center;font-size:.8rem;">'+c+'</td>';});h+='</tr>';});
  h+='</tbody></table></div>';
  return h;
};

// confirm
var confCb=null;
var gc=function(txt,cb){$('gctxt').textContent=txt;confCb=cb;$('gcm').style.display='flex';};
var vc=function(txt,cb){$('vctxt').textContent=txt;confCb=cb;$('vcm').style.display='flex';};
$('gcno').onclick=function(){$('gcm').style.display='none';confCb=null;};
$('gcok').onclick=function(){if(confCb)confCb();$('gcm').style.display='none';confCb=null;};
$('vcno').onclick=function(){$('vcm').style.display='none';confCb=null;};
$('vcok').onclick=function(){if(confCb)confCb();$('vcm').style.display='none';confCb=null;};

// close modals on backdrop
['gpm','grm','ghm','gcm','mpm','mrm','mhm','hpm','hrm','hhm','vcm'].forEach(function(id){
  $(id).addEventListener('click',function(e){if(e.target===$(id))$(id).style.display='none';});
});

// ── NAV ──
document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(function(t){
  t.addEventListener('click',function(){
    document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(function(x){x.classList.remove('on');});
    document.querySelectorAll('.pg').forEach(function(x){x.classList.remove('on');});
    t.classList.add('on');
    $(t.dataset.pg).classList.add('on');
  });
});

// ── GALERÍA ──
var addImg=function(src){
  var d=document.createElement('div');d.className='gi';
  d.innerHTML='<img src="'+src+'" alt=""><button class="di">✕</button>';
  d.querySelector('.di').addEventListener('click',function(){d.remove();updGal();});
  $('gg').appendChild(d);updGal();
};
var updGal=function(){$('ge').style.display=$('gg').children.length?'none':'block';};
$('fi').addEventListener('change',function(e){Array.from(e.target.files).forEach(function(f){var r=new FileReader();r.onload=function(ev){addImg(ev.target.result);};r.readAsDataURL(f);});e.target.value='';});
$('ua').addEventListener('dragover',function(e){e.preventDefault();$('ua').classList.add('dov');});
$('ua').addEventListener('dragleave',function(){$('ua').classList.remove('dov');});
$('ua').addEventListener('drop',function(e){e.preventDefault();$('ua').classList.remove('dov');Array.from(e.dataTransfer.files).filter(function(f){return f.type.startsWith('image/');}).forEach(function(f){var r=new FileReader();r.onload=function(ev){addImg(ev.target.result);};r.readAsDataURL(f);});});

// ── GERIATRÍA ──
var Gd=[], Gs=null;
var Gsv=function(){sv('siac_g',Gd);};
var Ginf=function(){svTs('siac_g',function(u){$('ginf').textContent=Gd.length+' paciente(s) · '+(u?fd(u):'—');});};
window.gExp=function(){expDl({patients:Gd,at:new Date().toISOString()},'siac_geri_'+new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)+'.json');};
window.gImp=function(e){var f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return;var r=new FileReader();r.onload=function(ev){try{var d=JSON.parse(ev.target.result);var imp=d.patients||d;if(!Array.isArray(imp))throw new Error('Formato inválido');var ex=Gd.map(function(p){return p.id;});var a=0,s=0;imp.forEach(function(p){if(!ex.includes(p.id)){Gd.push(p);a++;}else s++;});Gsv();gRL();Ginf();alert('✅ '+a+' importados, '+s+' ya existían.');}catch(err){alert('❌ '+err.message);}};r.readAsText(f);e.target.value='';};

var gRL=function(){
  var ul=$('gpl');ul.innerHTML='';
  if(!Gd.length){ul.innerHTML='<li style="text-align:center;color:#bbb;padding:1.5rem 0;font-size:.87rem;">Sin pacientes.</li>';return;}
  Gd.forEach(function(p){
    var li=document.createElement('li');
    li.style.cssText='display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:.62rem .8rem;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s;';
    li.className='pli'+(p.id===Gs?' sel':'');
    li.innerHTML='<div><p style="font-weight:600;font-size:.88rem;color:#333;">'+p.nm+'</p><p style="font-size:.76rem;color:#888;">'+p.id+' · '+age(p.bd)+' años</p></div><button style="background:#dc3545;color:#fff;border:none;padding:.18rem .45rem;border-radius:5px;font-size:.72rem;cursor:pointer;" class="gdl" data-id="'+p.id+'">✕</button>';
    li.addEventListener('click',function(e){if(e.target.classList.contains('gdl'))return;Gs=p.id;gRD();gRL();});
    ul.appendChild(li);
  });
  ul.querySelectorAll('.gdl').forEach(function(b){b.addEventListener('click',function(e){e.stopPropagation();var p=Gd.find(function(x){return x.id===e.target.dataset.id;});gc('¿Eliminar a '+p.nm+'?',function(){Gd=Gd.filter(function(x){return x.id!==p.id;});if(Gs===p.id)Gs=null;Gsv();gRL();gRD();Ginf();});});});
};

var gRD=function(){
  if(!Gs){$('gwel').style.display='block';$('gdet').style.display='none';return;}
  var p=Gd.find(function(x){return x.id===Gs;});if(!p)return;
  $('gwel').style.display='none';$('gdet').style.display='block';
  $('gpn').textContent=p.nm;$('gpi').textContent='Doc: '+p.id+' · '+age(p.bd)+' años · '+(p.sx||'');
  $('grpn').textContent=p.nm;
  var recs=(p.recs||[]).slice().sort(function(a,b){return new Date(a.dt)-new Date(b.dt);});
  var lbls=recs.map(function(r){return fd(r.dt);});
  mkC('cFr','SPPB',lbls,recs.map(function(r){return r.fr;}),'#2d6a4f');
  mkC('cFl','Up&Go',lbls,recs.map(function(r){return r.fl;}),'#40916c');
  mkC('cCo','Pfeiffer',lbls,recs.map(function(r){return r.co;}),'#dda15e');
  mkC('cAd','Morisky',lbls,recs.map(function(r){return r.ad;}),'#bc6c25');
  mkC('cCa','Framingham',lbls,recs.map(function(r){return r.ca;}),'#c1121f');
  gRR(p);
};

var gRR=function(p){
  var el=$('grec');
  el.innerHTML='<h3 style="font-family:\'Playfair Display\',serif;font-size:.95rem;color:var(--v);margin-bottom:.8rem;">Historial de Mediciones</h3>';
  if(!p.recs||!p.recs.length){el.innerHTML+='<p style="color:#aaa;font-size:.87rem;">Sin mediciones.</p>';return;}
  var rows=p.recs.map(function(r,i){return[fd(r.dt),r.fr,r.fl+'s',r.co,r.ad===0?'✅':'❌('+r.ad+')','<button class="btnr gdlr" data-i="'+i+'" style="padding:.18rem .42rem;font-size:.72rem;">✕</button>'];});
  var div=document.createElement('div');div.innerHTML=mkTbl(['Fecha','SPPB','Caída','Pfeiffer','Morisky','✕'],'#2d6a4f',rows);el.appendChild(div);
  el.querySelectorAll('.gdlr').forEach(function(b){b.addEventListener('click',function(e){var i=parseInt(e.target.dataset.i);gc('¿Eliminar medición?',function(){p.recs.splice(i,1);Gsv();gRD();});});});
};

// geri sub-tabs
$('gt1').addEventListener('click',function(){$('gt1').classList.add('on');$('gt2').classList.remove('on');$('gt3').classList.remove('on');$('gv1').style.display='block';$('gv2').style.display='none';$('gv3').style.display='none';});
$('gt2').addEventListener('click',function(){$('gt2').classList.add('on');$('gt1').classList.remove('on');$('gt3').classList.remove('on');$('gv1').style.display='none';$('gv2').style.display='block';$('gv3').style.display='none';gAgg();});
$('gt3').addEventListener('click',function(){$('gt3').classList.add('on');$('gt1').classList.remove('on');$('gt2').classList.remove('on');$('gv1').style.display='none';$('gv2').style.display='none';$('gv3').style.display='block';});

var gAgg=function(){
  var all=Gd.reduce(function(a,p){return a.concat(p.recs||[]);}, []);if(!all.length)return;
  var bd={};all.forEach(function(r){if(!bd[r.dt])bd[r.dt]={fr:[],fl:[],co:[],ad:[],ca:[]};['fr','fl','co','ad','ca'].forEach(function(k){if(r[k]!==undefined)bd[r.dt][k].push(r[k]);});});
  var dates=Object.keys(bd).sort(function(a,b){return new Date(a)-new Date(b);});
  var avg=function(arr){return arr.length?arr.reduce(function(a,b){return a+b;},0)/arr.length:0;};
  mkC('acFr','SPPB',dates.map(fd),dates.map(function(d){return +avg(bd[d].fr).toFixed(2);}),'#2d6a4f');
  mkC('acFl','Up&Go',dates.map(fd),dates.map(function(d){return +avg(bd[d].fl).toFixed(2);}),'#40916c');
  mkC('acCo','Pfeiffer',dates.map(fd),dates.map(function(d){return +avg(bd[d].co).toFixed(2);}),'#dda15e');
  mkC('acAd','Morisky',dates.map(fd),dates.map(function(d){return +avg(bd[d].ad).toFixed(2);}),'#bc6c25');
  mkC('acCa','Framingham',dates.map(fd),dates.map(function(d){return +avg(bd[d].ca).toFixed(2);}),'#c1121f');
};

// Morisky
$('grf').addEventListener('change',function(e){
  if(!e.target.name||!e.target.name.startsWith('mq'))return;
  var q1=document.querySelector('input[name="mq1"]:checked'),q2=document.querySelector('input[name="mq2"]:checked'),q3=document.querySelector('input[name="mq3"]:checked'),q4=document.querySelector('input[name="mq4"]:checked'),res=$('morres');
  if(!q1||!q2||!q3||!q4){res.textContent='Seleccione una respuesta para cada pregunta.';res.style.background='#f5f5f5';$('gradh').value='';return;}
  var s=0;if(q1.value==='si')s++;if(q2.value==='no')s++;if(q3.value==='si')s++;if(q4.value==='si')s++;
  $('gradh').value=s;
  if(s===0){res.innerHTML='<strong>✅ Cumple</strong>';res.style.background='#d8f3dc';res.style.color='#1b4332';}
  else{res.innerHTML='<strong>❌ No Cumple</strong> (puntaje: '+s+')';res.style.background='#fde8e8';res.style.color='#c00';}
});

$('gab').addEventListener('click',function(){$('gpf').reset();$('gpeid').value='';$('gpgin').style.display='block';$('gpm').style.display='flex';});
$('gpsex').addEventListener('change',function(e){$('gpgin').style.display=e.target.value==='Femenino'?'block':'none';});
$('gpf').addEventListener('submit',function(e){
  e.preventDefault();
  var eid=$('gpeid').value;
  var d={id:$('gpdoc').value,nm:$('gpname').value,bd:$('gpbd').value,sx:$('gpsex').value,addr:$('gpaddr').value,tel:$('gptel').value,civ:$('gpciv').value,occ:$('gpocc').value,eapbs:$('gpeapbs').value,reg:$('gpreg').value,reason:$('gpreason').value,ill:$('gpill').value,hous:$('gphous').value,apat:$('gpapat').value,aqui:$('gpaqui').value,afar:$('gpafar').value,atox:$('gpatox').value,afam:$('gpafam').value,aale:$('gpaale').value,ahem:$('gpahem').value,fur:$('gpfur').value,gg:$('gpgg').value,gp:$('gpgp').value,gv:$('gpgv').value,ga:$('gpga').value,gc_:$('gpgc').value,plan:$('gpplan').value};
  if(eid){var i=Gd.findIndex(function(x){return x.id===eid;});if(i>-1)Gd[i]=Object.assign({},d,{recs:Gd[i].recs});}
  else{if(Gd.some(function(x){return x.id===d.id;})){alert('Ya existe paciente con ese documento.');return;}Gd.push(Object.assign({},d,{recs:[]}));}
  Gsv();gRL();if(eid)gRD();Ginf();$('gpm').style.display='none';
});

$('gedb').addEventListener('click',function(){
  var p=Gd.find(function(x){return x.id===Gs;});if(!p)return;
  $('gpf').reset();$('gpeid').value=p.id;
  $('gpname').value=p.nm||'';$('gpdoc').value=p.id;$('gpbd').value=p.bd||'';$('gpsex').value=p.sx||'Femenino';
  $('gpaddr').value=p.addr||'';$('gptel').value=p.tel||'';$('gpciv').value=p.civ||'';$('gpocc').value=p.occ||'';
  $('gpeapbs').value=p.eapbs||'';$('gpreg').value=p.reg||'';$('gpreason').value=p.reason||'';$('gpill').value=p.ill||'';
  $('gphous').value=p.hous||'';$('gpapat').value=p.apat||'';$('gpaqui').value=p.aqui||'';$('gpafar').value=p.afar||'';
  $('gpatox').value=p.atox||'';$('gpafam').value=p.afam||'';$('gpaale').value=p.aale||'';$('gpahem').value=p.ahem||'';
  $('gpfur').value=p.fur||'';$('gpgg').value=p.gg||'';$('gpgp').value=p.gp||'';$('gpgv').value=p.gv||'';
  $('gpga').value=p.ga||'';$('gpgc').value=p.gc_||'';$('gpplan').value=p.plan||'';
  $('gpgin').style.display=p.sx==='Femenino'?'block':'none';$('gpm').style.display='flex';
});

$('ghsb').addEventListener('click',function(){
  var p=Gd.find(function(x){return x.id===Gs;});if(!p)return;
  $('ghname').textContent=p.nm;
  $('ghc').innerHTML='<div style="background:#f0faf5;border-radius:10px;padding:1rem;margin-bottom:.8rem;"><h3 style="color:var(--v);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.5rem;">Identificación</h3>'+row('Nombre',p.nm)+row('Doc',p.id)+row('Nacimiento',p.bd)+row('Sexo',p.sx)+row('Dirección',p.addr)+row('Teléfono',p.tel)+row('Estado Civil',p.civ)+row('Ocupación',p.occ)+row('EAPBS',p.eapbs)+row('Régimen',p.reg)+'</div><div style="background:#fff8f0;border-radius:10px;padding:1rem;margin-bottom:.8rem;"><h3 style="color:var(--td);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.5rem;">Consulta</h3>'+row('Motivo',p.reason)+row('Enfermedad',p.ill)+'</div><div style="background:#f5f5f5;border-radius:10px;padding:1rem;"><h3 style="color:#444;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.5rem;">Antecedentes</h3>'+row('Patológicos',p.apat)+row('Quirúrgicos',p.aqui)+row('Farmacológicos',p.afar)+row('Tóxicos',p.atox)+row('Familiares',p.afam)+row('Alérgicos',p.aale)+row('Hemoclasificación',p.ahem)+'</div>'+(p.sx==='Femenino'?'<div style="background:#fdf0f8;border-radius:10px;padding:1rem;margin-top:.8rem;"><h3 style="color:#9b2c7e;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.5rem;">Ginecológicos</h3>'+row('FUR',p.fur)+row('G',p.gg)+row('P',p.gp)+row('V',p.gv)+row('A',p.ga)+row('C',p.gc_)+row('Planificación',p.plan)+'</div>':'');
  $('ghm').style.display='flex';
});

$('grb').addEventListener('click',function(){if(!Gs)return;$('grf').reset();$('grdate').valueAsDate=new Date();$('morres').textContent='Seleccione una respuesta para cada pregunta.';$('morres').style.background='#f5f5f5';$('gradh').value='';$('grm').style.display='flex';});
$('grf').addEventListener('submit',function(e){
  e.preventDefault();
  var p=Gd.find(function(x){return x.id===Gs;});if(!p)return;
  p.recs=p.recs||[];
  p.recs.push({dt:$('grdate').value,fr:parseFloat($('grfrag').value),fl:parseFloat($('grfall').value),co:parseFloat($('grcog').value),ad:parseFloat($('gradh').value),ca:parseFloat($('grcard').value)});
  Gsv();gRD();$('grm').style.display='none';
});

// ── VG MUJERES ──
var Md=[], Ms=null;
var Msv=function(){sv('siac_m',Md);};
var Minf=function(){svTs('siac_m',function(u){$('minf').textContent=Md.length+' caso(s) · '+(u?fd(u):'—');});};
window.mExp=function(){expDl({cases:Md,at:new Date().toISOString()},'siac_mujeres_'+new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)+'.json');};
window.mImp=function(e){var f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return;var r=new FileReader();r.onload=function(ev){try{var d=JSON.parse(ev.target.result);var imp=d.cases||d;if(!Array.isArray(imp))throw new Error('Formato inválido');var ex=Md.map(function(x){return x.id;});var a=0,s=0;imp.forEach(function(x){if(!ex.includes(x.id)){Md.push(x);a++;}else s++;});Msv();mRL();Minf();alert('✅ '+a+' importados, '+s+' ya existían.');}catch(err){alert('❌ '+err.message);}};r.readAsText(f);e.target.value='';};

var mRL=function(){
  var ul=$('mpl');ul.innerHTML='';
  if(!Md.length){ul.innerHTML='<li style="text-align:center;color:#bbb;padding:1.5rem 0;font-size:.87rem;">Sin casos.</li>';return;}
  Md.forEach(function(c){
    var li=document.createElement('li');
    li.style.cssText='display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:.62rem .8rem;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s;';
    li.className='pli'+(c.id===Ms?' sel':'');
    li.innerHTML='<div><p style="font-weight:600;font-size:.88rem;color:#333;">'+c.nm+'</p><p style="font-size:.76rem;color:#888;">'+c.id+' · '+age(c.bd)+' años</p></div><button style="background:#dc3545;color:#fff;border:none;padding:.18rem .45rem;border-radius:5px;font-size:.72rem;cursor:pointer;" class="mdl" data-id="'+c.id+'">✕</button>';
    li.addEventListener('click',function(e){if(e.target.classList.contains('mdl'))return;Ms=c.id;mRD();mRL();});
    ul.appendChild(li);
  });
  ul.querySelectorAll('.mdl').forEach(function(b){b.addEventListener('click',function(e){e.stopPropagation();var c=Md.find(function(x){return x.id===e.target.dataset.id;});vc('¿Eliminar caso de '+c.nm+'?',function(){Md=Md.filter(function(x){return x.id!==c.id;});if(Ms===c.id)Ms=null;Msv();mRL();mRD();Minf();});});});
};

var mRD=function(){
  if(!Ms){$('mwel').style.display='block';$('mdet').style.display='none';return;}
  var c=Md.find(function(x){return x.id===Ms;});if(!c)return;
  $('mwel').style.display='none';$('mdet').style.display='block';
  $('mcn').textContent=c.nm;$('mci').textContent='Doc: '+c.id+' · '+age(c.bd)+' años';
  $('mrcn').textContent=c.nm;
  var recs=(c.recs||[]).slice().sort(function(a,b){return new Date(a.dt)-new Date(b.dt);});
  var lbls=recs.map(function(r){return fd(r.dt);});
  mkC('cWA','WAST',lbls,recs.map(function(r){return r.wa;}),'#a855f7');
  mkC('cIS','ISA',lbls,recs.map(function(r){return r.is;}),'#7c3aed');
  mkC('cDA','Danger',lbls,recs.map(function(r){return r.da;}),'#f43f5e');
  mRR(c);
};

var mRR=function(c){
  var el=$('mrec');
  el.innerHTML='<h3 style="font-family:\'Playfair Display\',serif;font-size:.95rem;color:#6b21a8;margin-bottom:.8rem;">Historial de Valoraciones</h3>';
  if(!c.recs||!c.recs.length){el.innerHTML+='<p style="color:#aaa;font-size:.87rem;">Sin valoraciones.</p>';return;}
  var rows=c.recs.map(function(r,i){return[fd(r.dt),r.wa,r.is,r.da,r.no||'—','<button class="btnr mdlr" data-i="'+i+'" style="padding:.18rem .42rem;font-size:.72rem;">✕</button>'];});
  var div=document.createElement('div');div.innerHTML=mkTbl(['Fecha','WAST','ISA','Danger','Obs.','✕'],'#a855f7',rows);el.appendChild(div);
  el.querySelectorAll('.mdlr').forEach(function(b){b.addEventListener('click',function(e){var i=parseInt(e.target.dataset.i);vc('¿Eliminar valoración?',function(){c.recs.splice(i,1);Msv();mRD();});});});
};

$('mt1').addEventListener('click',function(){$('mt1').classList.add('on');$('mt2').classList.remove('on');$('mv1').style.display='block';$('mv2').style.display='none';});
$('mt2').addEventListener('click',function(){$('mt2').classList.add('on');$('mt1').classList.remove('on');$('mv2').style.display='block';$('mv1').style.display='none';});

$('mab').addEventListener('click',function(){$('mpf').reset();$('mpeid').value='';$('mpm').style.display='flex';});
$('mpf').addEventListener('submit',function(e){
  e.preventDefault();
  var eid=$('mpeid').value;
  var vt=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.mvt:checked')).map(function(x){return x.value;});
  var d={id:$('mpdoc').value,nm:$('mpname').value,bd:$('mpbd').value,tel:$('mptel').value,addr:$('mpaddr').value,civ:$('mpciv').value,vt:vt,dur:$('mpdur').value,reason:$('mpreason').value,rep:$('mprep').value,route:$('mproute').value};
  if(eid){var i=Md.findIndex(function(x){return x.id===eid;});if(i>-1)Md[i]=Object.assign({},d,{recs:Md[i].recs});}
  else{if(Md.some(function(x){return x.id===d.id;})){alert('Ya existe caso con ese documento.');return;}Md.push(Object.assign({},d,{recs:[]}));}
  Msv();mRL();if(eid)mRD();Minf();$('mpm').style.display='none';
});
$('medb').addEventListener('click',function(){
  var c=Md.find(function(x){return x.id===Ms;});if(!c)return;
  $('mpf').reset();$('mpeid').value=c.id;$('mpname').value=c.nm||'';$('mpdoc').value=c.id;$('mpbd').value=c.bd||'';
  $('mptel').value=c.tel||'';$('mpaddr').value=c.addr||'';$('mpciv').value=c.civ||'Soltera';
  document.querySelectorAll('.mvt').forEach(function(cb){cb.checked=(c.vt||[]).includes(cb.value);});
  $('mpdur').value=c.dur||'';$('mpreason').value=c.reason||'';$('mprep').value=c.rep||'No';$('mproute').value=c.route||'';
  $('mpm').style.display='flex';
});
$('mhsb').addEventListener('click',function(){
  var c=Md.find(function(x){return x.id===Ms;});if(!c)return;
  $('mhname').textContent=c.nm;
  $('mhc').innerHTML='<div style="background:#faf5ff;border-radius:10px;padding:1rem;margin-bottom:.8rem;"><h3 style="color:#6b21a8;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.5rem;">Identificación</h3>'+row('Nombre',c.nm)+row('Doc',c.id)+row('Nacimiento',c.bd)+row('Teléfono',c.tel)+row('Dirección',c.addr)+row('Estado Civil',c.civ)+'</div><div style="background:#fff1f2;border-radius:10px;padding:1rem;"><h3 style="color:#be123c;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.5rem;">Contexto</h3>'+row('Tipos',(c.vt||[]).join(', '))+row('Duración',c.dur)+row('Motivo',c.reason)+row('Denuncias',c.rep)+row('Ruta',c.route)+'</div>';
  $('mhm').style.display='flex';
});
$('mrb').addEventListener('click',function(){if(!Ms)return;$('mrf').reset();$('mrdate').valueAsDate=new Date();$('mrm').style.display='flex';});
$('mrf').addEventListener('submit',function(e){
  e.preventDefault();var c=Md.find(function(x){return x.id===Ms;});if(!c)return;
  c.recs=c.recs||[];c.recs.push({dt:$('mrdate').value,wa:parseFloat($('mrwast').value),is:parseFloat($('mrisa').value),da:parseFloat($('mrdanger').value),no:$('mrnotes').value});
  Msv();mRD();$('mrm').style.display='none';
});

// ── VG HOMBRES ──
var Hd=[], Hs=null;
var Hsv=function(){sv('siac_h',Hd);};
var Hinf=function(){svTs('siac_h',function(u){$('hinf').textContent=Hd.length+' caso(s) · '+(u?fd(u):'—');});};
window.hExp=function(){expDl({cases:Hd,at:new Date().toISOString()},'siac_hombres_'+new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)+'.json');};
window.hImp=function(e){var f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return;var r=new FileReader();r.onload=function(ev){try{var d=JSON.parse(ev.target.result);var imp=d.cases||d;if(!Array.isArray(imp))throw new Error('Formato inválido');var ex=Hd.map(function(x){return x.id;});var a=0,s=0;imp.forEach(function(x){if(!ex.includes(x.id)){Hd.push(x);a++;}else s++;});Hsv();hRL();Hinf();alert('✅ '+a+' importados, '+s+' ya existían.');}catch(err){alert('❌ '+err.message);}};r.readAsText(f);e.target.value='';};

var hRL=function(){
  var ul=$('hpl');ul.innerHTML='';
  if(!Hd.length){ul.innerHTML='<li style="text-align:center;color:#bbb;padding:1.5rem 0;font-size:.87rem;">Sin casos.</li>';return;}
  Hd.forEach(function(c){
    var li=document.createElement('li');
    li.style.cssText='display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:.62rem .8rem;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s;';
    li.className='pli'+(c.id===Hs?' sel':'');
    li.innerHTML='<div><p style="font-weight:600;font-size:.88rem;color:#333;">'+c.nm+'</p><p style="font-size:.76rem;color:#888;">'+c.id+' · '+age(c.bd)+' años · '+(c.role||'')+'</p></div><button style="background:#dc3545;color:#fff;border:none;padding:.18rem .45rem;border-radius:5px;font-size:.72rem;cursor:pointer;" class="hdl" data-id="'+c.id+'">✕</button>';
    li.addEventListener('click',function(e){if(e.target.classList.contains('hdl'))return;Hs=c.id;hRD();hRL();});
    ul.appendChild(li);
  });
  ul.querySelectorAll('.hdl').forEach(function(b){b.addEventListener('click',function(e){e.stopPropagation();var c=Hd.find(function(x){return x.id===e.target.dataset.id;});vc('¿Eliminar caso de '+c.nm+'?',function(){Hd=Hd.filter(function(x){return x.id!==c.id;});if(Hs===c.id)Hs=null;Hsv();hRL();hRD();Hinf();});});});
};

var hRD=function(){
  if(!Hs){$('hwel').style.display='block';$('hdet').style.display='none';return;}
  var c=Hd.find(function(x){return x.id===Hs;});if(!c)return;
  $('hwel').style.display='none';$('hdet').style.display='block';
  $('hcn').textContent=c.nm;$('hci').textContent='Doc: '+c.id+' · '+age(c.bd)+' años · '+(c.role||'');
  $('hrcn').textContent=c.nm;
  var recs=(c.recs||[]).slice().sort(function(a,b){return new Date(a.dt)-new Date(b.dt);});
