  var lbls=recs.map(function(r){return fd(r.dt);});
  mkC('cAU','AUDIT',lbls,recs.map(function(r){return r.au;}),'#3b82f6');
  mkC('cSA','SARA',lbls,recs.map(function(r){return r.sa;}),'#6366f1');
  mkC('cEA','EAS',lbls,recs.map(function(r){return r.ea;}),'#eab308');
  hRR(c);
};

var hRR=function(c){
  var el=$('hrec');
  el.innerHTML='<h3 style="font-family:\'Playfair Display\',serif;font-size:.95rem;color:#1e3a8a;margin-bottom:.8rem;">Historial de Valoraciones</h3>';
  if(!c.recs||!c.recs.length){el.innerHTML+='<p style="color:#aaa;font-size:.87rem;">Sin valoraciones.</p>';return;}
  var rows=c.recs.map(function(r,i){return[fd(r.dt),r.au,r.sa,r.ea,r.no||'—','<button class="btnr hdlr" data-i="'+i+'" style="padding:.18rem .42rem;font-size:.72rem;">✕</button>'];});
  var div=document.createElement('div');div.innerHTML=mkTbl(['Fecha','AUDIT','SARA','EAS','Obs.','✕'],'#3b82f6',rows);el.appendChild(div);
  el.querySelectorAll('.hdlr').forEach(function(b){b.addEventListener('click',function(e){var i=parseInt(e.target.dataset.i);vc('¿Eliminar valoración?',function(){c.recs.splice(i,1);Hsv();hRD();});});});
};

$('ht1').addEventListener('click',function(){$('ht1').classList.add('on');$('ht2').classList.remove('on');$('hv1').style.display='block';$('hv2').style.display='none';});
$('ht2').addEventListener('click',function(){$('ht2').classList.add('on');$('ht1').classList.remove('on');$('hv2').style.display='block';$('hv1').style.display='none';});

$('hab').addEventListener('click',function(){$('hpf').reset();$('hpeid').value='';$('hpm').style.display='flex';});
$('hpf').addEventListener('submit',function(e){
  e.preventDefault();
  var eid=$('hpeid').value;
  var vt=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.hvt:checked')).map(function(x){return x.value;});
  var d={id:$('hpdoc').value,nm:$('hpname').value,bd:$('hpbd').value,tel:$('hptel').value,addr:$('hpaddr').value,role:$('hprole').value,vt:vt,dur:$('hpdur').value,reason:$('hpreason').value,legal:$('hplegal').value,inter:$('hpinter').value};
  if(eid){var i=Hd.findIndex(function(x){return x.id===eid;});if(i>-1)Hd[i]=Object.assign({},d,{recs:Hd[i].recs});}
  else{if(Hd.some(function(x){return x.id===d.id;})){alert('Ya existe caso con ese documento.');return;}Hd.push(Object.assign({},d,{recs:[]}));}
  Hsv();hRL();if(eid)hRD();Hinf();$('hpm').style.display='none';
});
$('hedb').addEventListener('click',function(){
  var c=Hd.find(function(x){return x.id===Hs;});if(!c)return;
  $('hpf').reset();$('hpeid').value=c.id;$('hpname').value=c.nm||'';$('hpdoc').value=c.id;$('hpbd').value=c.bd||'';
  $('hptel').value=c.tel||'';$('hpaddr').value=c.addr||'';$('hprole').value=c.role||'Agresor en proceso';
  document.querySelectorAll('.hvt').forEach(function(cb){cb.checked=(c.vt||[]).includes(cb.value);});
  $('hpdur').value=c.dur||'';$('hpreason').value=c.reason||'';$('hplegal').value=c.legal||'No';$('hpinter').value=c.inter||'';
  $('hpm').style.display='flex';
});
$('hhsb').addEventListener('click',function(){
  var c=Hd.find(function(x){return x.id===Hs;});if(!c)return;
  $('hhname').textContent=c.nm;
  $('hhc').innerHTML='<div style="background:#eff6ff;border-radius:10px;padding:1rem;margin-bottom:.8rem;"><h3 style="color:#1e3a8a;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.5rem;">Identificación</h3>'+row('Nombre',c.nm)+row('Doc',c.id)+row('Nacimiento',c.bd)+row('Teléfono',c.tel)+row('Dirección',c.addr)+row('Rol',c.role)+'</div><div style="background:#fefce8;border-radius:10px;padding:1rem;"><h3 style="color:#713f12;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.5rem;">Contexto</h3>'+row('Tipos',(c.vt||[]).join(', '))+row('Duración',c.dur)+row('Motivo',c.reason)+row('Medidas legales',c.legal)+row('Intervención',c.inter)+'</div>';
  $('hhm').style.display='flex';
});
$('hrb').addEventListener('click',function(){if(!Hs)return;$('hrf').reset();$('hrdate').valueAsDate=new Date();$('hrm').style.display='flex';});
$('hrf').addEventListener('submit',function(e){
  e.preventDefault();var c=Hd.find(function(x){return x.id===Hs;});if(!c)return;
  c.recs=c.recs||[];c.recs.push({dt:$('hrdate').value,au:parseFloat($('hraudit').value),sa:parseFloat($('hrsara').value),ea:parseFloat($('hreas').value),no:$('hrnotes').value});
  Hsv();hRD();$('hrm').style.display='none';
});

// ── INIT — load from IndexedDB then render ──
_dbReady.then(function(){
  ldAsync('siac_g',[],function(g){
    Gd=g;
    ldAsync('siac_m',[],function(m){
      Md=m;
      ldAsync('siac_h',[],function(h){
        Hd=h;
        gRL();gRD();Ginf();
        mRL();mRD();Minf();
        hRL();hRD();Hinf();
      });
    });
  });
}).catch(function(){
  // Fallback: render empty
  gRL();gRD();Ginf();
  mRL();mRD();Minf();
  hRL();hRD();Hinf();
});
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
